name: Pest Control
title: AI Tools for Pest Control Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for pest control — book service fast, keep recurring plans on schedule, and chase renewals. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: Recurring service plans are the heart of the business — and they need steady, reliable contact. We build the tools that keep every account on schedule and every renewal on track.
drains: New-service calls that need a fast, confident reply
Recurring quarterly plans slipping off schedule
Renewals lapsing because no one tracked the dates
Seasonal spikes — ants, mosquitoes, rodents — overwhelming the office

tools.title: New-service assistant
tools.body: Every call and form gets an instant reply, the pest identified, the plan recommended, and the first visit booked — so seasonal spikes turn into signed accounts.

tools.title: Plan & renewal manager
tools.body: It tracks every recurring plan, schedules the next visit, and reaches out before a contract lapses — protecting the recurring revenue that keeps the business stable.

tools.title: Service-update assistant
tools.body: Before each visit, customers get a friendly reminder; after, a summary and a review prompt. Fewer missed appointments, more reviews.

tools.title: Morning route brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's stops, technician routing, renewals due, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A pest control company built on quarterly service plans.
cases.before: Renewals slipped because dates weren't tracked closely; some accounts lapsed silently.
cases.after: Every plan tracked, every renewal nudged before it expired.
cases.impact: Representative result: a measurable drop in silent plan cancellations.

cases.context: A company overwhelmed by seasonal mosquito-season calls.
cases.before: The summer spike buried the office; callers waited or gave up.
cases.after: Every spike call answered instantly, the plan recommended, the visit booked.
cases.impact: Representative result: more seasonal calls converted into year-round accounts.

faq.q: Can it recommend the right plan from a customer's description?
faq.a: Yes. We train it on your service plans and pricing so it can identify the pest, recommend the right plan, and book the first visit — all in one conversation.

faq.q: How does it protect recurring revenue?
faq.a: It tracks every plan's schedule and renewal date and reaches out before anything lapses. Quarterly and annual plans stop slipping through the cracks.

faq.q: Will it work with PestPac or FieldRoutes?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of the routing and CRM software you already run.
